summary: Match the desktop render-cache adapter to the Rust workspaceIdentity command contract.

decisions.decision: Send workspaceIdentity to every Rust render_cache command and assert that exact field at the TypeScript adapter and clean-Sandbox diagnostic boundaries.
decisions.rationale: The Rust commands name their parameter workspace_identity and expose it as workspaceIdentity through Tauri camel-case renaming. The desktop adapter instead sent projectIdentity for read, write, remove, clear, touch, and list, so every native disk-cache command rejected while mock-only tests blessed the wrong payload. Exact evidence at 0efb934 showed one enabled preference but render_cache_list rejection before close, after restart, and after reopen, matching the contract mismatch and explaining the persistent engine rerun.

testEvidence.criterion: Every desktop cache command must use the Rust command's workspaceIdentity field.
testEvidence.test: Change the adapter expectations to workspaceIdentity before changing production and run the focused adapter suite.

red.outcome: RED: 2/3 failed and showed the production adapter sending projectIdentity for native cache commands.

green.outcome: GREEN: 25/25 adapter and M4 harness tests passed with workspaceIdentity.

testEvidence.criterion: The correction must preserve disk serialization, runtime durability ordering, the M4 oracle, and TypeScript boundaries.
testEvidence.test: Run the four focused cache/runtime/M4 suites and TypeScript no-emit once.

red.command: Not applicable: the platform-contract RED above is the falsifying test.
red.outcome: No synthetic aggregate failure was created.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/render-cache/render-disk-cache.test.ts tests/application/runtime/workbench-runtime.test.ts tests/platform-desktop/tauri-render-cache.test.ts tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts --reporter=dot; pnpm.cmd run typecheck
green.outcome: GREEN: 68/68 focused tests passed and TypeScript no-emit passed.

nearMisses.sought: Exact native cache-record lifecycle and cold-start hit evidence
nearMisses.confirmation: The persisted preference was present and valid in all three phases, while render_cache_list rejected in all three phases and Full added one engine run; host cleanup passed.

questions: No owner decision is required; this repairs the typed platform contract to match the existing Rust command API.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
